cyb3rdan.com Another infosec blog

First Post

16 Nov 2018

Creating a blog is something I’ve been wanting to do for a while now, but there have been so many more important things going on in my life that meant I just never got around to it.

In terms of content, I have been focusing quite a lot on Hack The Box lately, and I will likely start with some walkthroughs once I get around to making my notes more complete.

Other than walkthroughs, I will be starting my OSCP journey soon, and am planning to add my thoughts to the many others who have been through the same process before me. The hope is that if I can write about certain tools and processes that it will only increase my chances of passing on my first attempt.

If that sort of stuff is of any interest to you, then keep an eye out for more posts.
